channel.title: Posts on Streams of thought
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Streams of thought

item.title: Börsdata meets Claude
item.description: After building yahoo-finance-mcp last month, I wanted to do the same thing for Nordic data. I’ve been using Börsdata for a while to keep tabs on Swedish stocks, so it was the obvious next target.

item.title: Stock data in your terminal
item.description: I wanted a way to pull stock data directly into Claude without leaving the terminal. So I built yahoo-finance-mcp — an MCP server that connects Yahoo Finance to any LLM that supports the Model Context Protocol.

item.title: Hello, world domination!
item.description: For the longest I’ve been meaning to publish my own site. But for some reason I’ve never taken the time to actually do it. I’ve been journalling for the last couple of years and grown into the habit of collecting my thoughts and ideas in writing.
